name: browser_press_key
description: Press a key in the browser page using DOM keyboard events.

key.description: Key to press, for example Enter, Escape, Tab, ArrowDown, or a single character.

viewId.description: Target browser tab ID. If omitted, uses the last interacted tab.

take_screenshot_afterwards.description: When true, takes a screenshot after the key press completes. Defaults to false.
